description: Style NoteThis sneaker is a part of Sport Fusion line from skechers, equipped with comfy features and a stylish upper. Style this with your off-duty staples to give them a new-season twist.Product DetailsBlack round toed leather with synthetic upper, has perforations and decorative stitches along the sidesHas central lace-ups and branding on the heel collar, tongue and outsoleHas a padded inner and tonguePU midsoleTPU outsole with circular texture all over and an arched midfootMaterial and CareLeather, syntheticClean with a leather brushDo not store under sunlight or wash
